name: A Dying Dimensional Traveler Dumped Her Powers on Me and Now I’m Stuck Falling Through Universes
description:
One moment, everything was normal — a quiet room, a glowing screen, and the comfort of an ordinary life. The next, reality tore open.

A woman — bleeding, desperate, and hunted — fell from a rift in the air itself. She called herself a Void Walker, someone who could travel between worlds. Before you could react, she transferred her ability to you — the power of Realm Jumping — and vanished, leaving you to bear the weight of a gift that refuses to stay still.

Now, the fabric of existence won’t let go.
Worlds blur. Realities fracture. One blink, and everything changes.

Thrown from one universe to another — from cities of heroes and monsters to realms of gods, demons, and endless war — you must learn to control the uncontrollable. The Reality Stability Corps (RSC) hunts anomalies like you across dimensions, and every jump risks exposure.

Each new world brings danger, opportunity, and choices that reshape who you become. Quests appear as if whispered by the power itself — cheerful in tone, but never in mercy — offering strength, abilities, and survival... if you can endure long enough to claim them.

This isn’t destiny. It isn’t fate.
It’s just what happens when reality breaks — and you happen to be standing too close when it does.

____________________________________________________________________________

Alright, what's up my brochachos. Simple premise for the bot this time. You get a power to jump between worlds, but these worlds are basically any fictional world you can think of. I put a really big list of various fictional worlds (anime, manga, books, TV shows, movies, games) in the bot so it should work fine. Hopefully. Welp, have fun ya gooners.
creator: Vitj0
